intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Footsteps, Vern. Every night around 3 AM. Upstairs when no one's there.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Built in 1920. But I've lived here ten years. This just started.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could be animals in the attic. Raccoons sound like footsteps.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: New activity after ten years. Something may have changed.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Record the audio. We can analyze it.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Maybe. Doors opening by themselves. Started last month.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Interior. Same two doors. Every couple of days.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Check the hinges and the foundation. Houses shift.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Same two doors. Consistent pattern. That's interesting.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Set up a camera. Next caller.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, what's going on at your place?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Strange occurrences, Vern. Nothing dramatic, but consistent.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Cold spots in one corner of the living room. Electronics acting up in that area. Radio turns on by itself.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Electrical issues could explain both. Have you had it inspected?

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Cold spots and electromagnetic interference together. Classic signs.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Get an EMF detector if you can. Track the readings.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: I'll look into it. Thank you, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, tell me about these occurrences.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Something's in my house, Vern. I can't see it, but I feel it.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What kind of feeling? Describe it.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Being watched. Especially in the hallway. My dog won't go near that area anymore.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Animals sense things, but it could be ultrasound or other mundane causes.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: He used to sleep in that hallway. Something changed.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Animals are sensitive to presences we can't perceive. Trust the dog.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Document the dog's behavior. It could be our best indicator.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}! What's happening at your place?!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Activity is picking up, Vern! Knocking on the walls! Shadows moving!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Peripheral vision mostly! But my security camera caught something too!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Camera footage! Have you analyzed it?! Could be artifacts!

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Checked it multiple times! Something's there!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: You caught it on camera! That's evidence!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: Finally proof I'm not imagining things!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send us that footage! We need to see this!
